The G.T.® Hammer Head® 90% tungsten dart has been the most desired dart among professional dart throwers for over 30 years.
The hand machined barrel is front loaded and features a continuous taper allowing for unprecedented flight trajectory.
The G.T.® III Thrust Cut TM allows the shooter a precise grip every throw!

The TWO PANEL PHOTO PLUS SOFTBALL is a regulation 3.5 inch diameter softball.
The first panel features your team name, personalized text message and photo.
The second panel features your full roster.
Imprint area is 2 inch x 2.6 inch.
Choose "ball display option" while ordering to proudly display your personalized softball!
4 - 11 : $20.99 ea.
12 - 49 : $18.99 ea.

These wooden Web-tex Boot Brushes are available individually in large and small sizes and feature firm black bristles to give your footwear a proper military-grade shine every time!
The small brush makes the perfect 'putting on brush' or a compact brush for your field kit.
The large brush is ideal as a 'taking off' brush.
Sold in singles.
Size: small (12.5cm x 2.8cm); large (15cm x 3.5cm).
Weight: from 40g each.

The ideal way to create masterpieces without the mess at home.
Sticky, glue, paint, get messy and have fun.
Summer term starts week commencing Monday, June 8, classes available at Ickleford Village Hall on Thursday 1.30pm (other classes available on Mondays and Fridays), for further details contact Helen or Lisa on 01462 451522/07769 952853.
